entry.title: New: RES24-217 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF ROUND-TRIP AIRFARE FOR TRAVEL BETWEEN HONOLULU AND PORTLAND, OREGON, LODGING, AND PER DIEM FOR SEVEN DAYS VALUED AT $5,640 TO THE CITY FROM THE HONOLULU ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY FOR TWO HONOLULU ZOO STAFF TO PARTICIPATE IN THE OREGON ZOO ELEPHANT EXCHANGE PROGRAM.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
